title: Trimble and FHNW Establish Trimble Technology Lab in Switzerland
text: FHNW's Trimble Technology Lab Supports Academics and Direct, Practice-Oriented Vocational Training for Architects, Civil Engineers and Geomatics Workforce WESTMINSTER, Colo., and MUTTENZ, Switzerland , April 28, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Building on a vision to cultivate a highly-trained workforce that will drive the innovative solutions of tomorrow, Trimble (NASDAQ: TRMB) and the University of Applied Sciences and Arts Northwestern Switzerland FHNW have collaborated to establish a state-of-the-art Trimble Technology Lab at FHNW's School of Architecture, Civil Engineering and Geomatics program in Muttenz, Switzerland.

title: Trimble Breaks Ground On 1.7-Megawatt Solar Array at Westminster, Colorado Headquarters
text: Project to Offset More than 100 Percent of Trimble's On-Site Energy Consumption,  Includes 660-Kilowatt Solar Carport with 49 Electric Vehicle Charging Stations WESTMINSTER, Colo. , April 21, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Trimble (NASDAQ: TRMB) announced today that the company has broken ground on the construction of a 1.7-megawatt solar array as a renewable energy source at its Westminster, Colorado headquarters.

title: Trimble (TRMB) Boosts Utility Business With Unity AMS Solution
text: Trimble (TRMB) enhances electric utilities' asset lifecycle management for sustainable and resilient operations with the launch of Trimble Unity AMS.

title: Trimble Opens First Trimble Technology Lab in New Zealand at the University of Auckland
text: New Lab to Provide Advanced Technology in Support of Academic Programs and Curriculum in Engineering and Construction

title: Launch of Trimble Unity AMS Provides Electric Utilities with Enterprise Asset Management Solution to Improve Reliability and Efficiency
text: Comprehensive GIS-Centric Asset Management Platform Integrates with Esri ArcGIS as the System of Record for Asset and Network Information

title: Walmart and 2 Other Innovative Stocks That Are Investing in Automation
text: Trimble provides leading automation solutions to a variety of industries. Walmart is hoping automation will reverse a downtrend of declining margins.

title: Trimble (TRMB) Boosts Transportation Segment With Transporeon
text: Trimble (TRMB) completes the acquisition of Transporeon. It is likely to aid Trimble's presence in the booming transportation management system market.

title: Trimble (TRMB) Enhances Fleet Manager With Dwell Time Metric
text: Trimble (TRMB) introduces dwell time metrics in its Fleet Manager solution in order to strengthen its transportation segment.

title: Trimble Completes Transporeon Acquisition
text: WESTMINSTER, Colo. , April 3, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Trimble (NASDAQ: TRMB) announced today that it has completed its previously announced acquisition of Transporeon.
